pageContext.name: Nichirin Sword (Tengen Uzui)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai present the Nichirin Sword (Tengen Uzui) Prop Replica!  From 'Kimetsu no Yaiba: Demon Slayer,' Tengen Uzui's Nichirin Swords joins the Proplica series. Twin blades, double the action, and excitement brought to life with Proplica quality and attention to detail.  *Requires four AAA batteries, sold separately.   Don't miss your chance to add this Proplica to your Demon Slayer collection today!
